part.specialInstructions: Fits BDL 68,72,76 clutch baskets and TF-1000/TF-2000, CDB-1-70, CDB-1090 belt drive kits
part.bullet1: BDL replacement components
part.bullet2: For use on BDL belt drive clutches.

part.bullet1: Complete 36T clutch basket assembly with BDL's ball-bearing lockup clutch
part.bullet2: Provides approximately 60% more surface contact area than stock clutch for smooth, sure power transfer
part.bullet3: Lockup design applies extra pressure to the clutch plates for positive engagement with no clutch slippage
part.bullet4: No increase in lever pull effort
part.bullet5: Includes 66T ring gear and 9T starter pinion gear
part.bullet7: Use of a 25T compensating sprocket recommended.

part.bullet1: Replacement BDL primary belt

part.partDescription: Primary Chain Drive Kit with Lockup Clutch
part.productName: Primary Chain Drive Kit with Ball-Bearing Lock-Up Clutch
part.bullet1: Complete chain drive kit featuring BDL's ball-bearing lockup clutch for riders who want a lighter, easier to operate clutch
part.bullet2: Provides approximately 60% more surface contact area than stock clutch for smooth, sure power transfer to the rear wheel
part.bullet3: Kit includes:
part.bullet4: Rear basket with BDL ball-bearing clutch
part.bullet5: 66T ring gear
part.bullet7: Front 25T sprocket
part.bullet9: Adjuster assembly

part.bullet1: Features BDL's ball-bearing lockup clutch with ring gear
part.bullet2: Kit includes:
part.bullet3: Motor plate
part.bullet4: 52T front pulley
part.bullet5: 142T belt
part.bullet7: Stand-offs
part.bullet9: Rear pulley cover with hardware

part.bullet1: Ball-bearing lockup clutch provides approximately 60% more surface contact area than the stock clutch for smooth, sure power transfer
part.bullet2: Kit includes:
part.bullet3: Motor plate
part.bullet4: Starter standoff
part.bullet5: Ring gear guard
part.bullet7: 52T front pulley
part.bullet9: Ring gear
part.bullet13: Requires the use of a '90-'06 style starter motor.

part.bullet1: Designed for electric start applications (uses '90-'06 style starter)
part.bullet2: Kit includes:
part.bullet3: Starter housing
part.bullet4: BDL ball-bearing lockup clutch assembly with ring gear
part.bullet5: Starter gear cover
part.bullet7: Front pulley and belt

part.bullet1: Includes BDL's ball-bearing lockup clutch, full-coverage side guard and top mesh belt guard
part.bullet2: Kit also includes motor plate and a 132T belt
part.bullet3: 2" drive width allows for the use of stock floorboards
part.bullet4: Made in the USA

part.bullet1: Includes BDL's ball-bearing lockup clutch, full-coverage side guard and top mesh belt guard
part.bullet2: Kit also includes motor plate and a 132T belt
part.bullet3: 2" drive width allows for the use of stock floorboards
part.bullet4: Made in the USA

part.bullet1: Kit contains three 5/16"-18 x 1-1/2" sockethead cap screws, three 5/16" lock washers, three 5/8" OD spacers and locking plate
part.bullet2: Made in the USA
part.bullet3: For use with BDL's standard, 3/4", 1", 1-1/4" or 1-1/2" offset insert kits.

part.productName: 1-5/8" 8 mm Belt Drive With Lockup Clutch
part.bullet1: 1-5/8" 8 mm kit includes front pulley, belt, clutch hub, clutch basket and aramid clutch set (consists of two half plates, four full plates and five steel drive plates)
part.bullet2: Rear pulley has a 40 mm, double-row bearing with an inner stress-proof steel clutch hub to support the clutch
part.bullet3: Lockup design applies extra pressure to the clutch plates for positive engagement with no clutch slippage
part.bullet4: Comes with the Quiet Clutch and ball-bearing lockup design pressure plate
part.bullet5: No increase in lever pull effort
part.bullet7: Made in the USA
part.bullet8: Not for use with offset primaries.
part.bullet9: Replacement components available separately.

part.productName: 8 mm Belt Drive with Quiet Clutch System
part.bullet1: 8 mm kit includes front pulley, belt, clutch hub, clutch basket and aramid clutch set (consists of two half plates, four full plates and five steel drive plates)
part.bullet2: Precision-machined, polished aluminum pressure plate uses nine springs and shoulder bolts to ensure even spring pressure (included in kit)
part.bullet3: Rear pulley has a 40 mm, double-row bearing with an inner stress-proof steel clutch hub to support the clutch
part.bullet4: Comes with the Quiet Clutch system
part.bullet5: Direct bolt-in applications
part.bullet7: Not for use with offset primaries.

part.productName: 3" Electric Start 8 mm Belt Drive with Lockup Clutch
part.bullet1: 3" electric start 8 mm kit includes front pulley, belt, clutch hub and clutch basket and aramid clutch set (consists of two half plates, four full plates and five steel drive plates), 6061-T6 billet motor plate, outside guard and polished pulley cover
part.bullet2: Rear pulley has a 40 mm, double-row bearing with an inner stress-proof steel clutch hub to support the clutch
part.bullet3: Lockup design applies extra pressure to the clutch plates for positive engagement with no clutch slippage
part.bullet4: Comes with the Quiet Clutch and ball-bearing lockup design pressure plate
part.bullet5: No increase in lever pull effort
part.bullet7: Made in the USA
part.bullet8: 3" systems are not designed for use with floorboards.
part.bullet9: Not for use with offset primaries.

part.productName: 8 mm Belt Drive with Quiet Clutch System
part.bullet1: 8 mm kit includes front pulley, belt, clutch hub, clutch basket and aramid clutch set (consists of two half plates, four full plates and five steel drive plates)
part.bullet2: Precision-machined, polished aluminum pressure plate uses nine springs and shoulder bolts to ensure even spring pressure (included in kit)
part.bullet3: Rear pulley has a 40 mm, double-row bearing with an inner stress-proof steel clutch hub to support the clutch
part.bullet4: Comes with the Quiet Clutch system
part.bullet5: Direct bolt-in applications
part.bullet7: Not for use with offset primaries.

part.productName: 8 mm Belt Drive Kit with Outboard Support Plate
part.bullet1: 3" 8 mm belt drive kit includes outboard bearing support for rear shaft
part.bullet2: Includes ball-bearing lockup design clutch pressure plate
part.bullet3: Similar design to BDL's "Top Fuel"-style belt kits
part.bullet4: Outer support plate is polished 6061 aluminum
part.bullet5: Includes clutch assembly
part.bullet7: Systems are not designed for use with floorboards.
part.bullet9: Replacement components available separately.

part.partDescription: Compensator Sprocket Kit - 34 Tooth - '07-'25 Big Twin
part.bullet1: Three-piece patented design with no spring
part.bullet2: Weighs less than the stock sprocket
part.bullet3: Made in the USA

part.productName: 2" Belt Drive Kit with Changeable Domes
part.bullet1: All-billet construction with a unique top guard that provides long-lasting service and functionality
part.bullet2: 2" drive kit loaded with style to accommodate custom trends
part.bullet3: Made in the USA
part.bullet4: Kit includes:
part.bullet5: Ball-bearing lockup clutch
part.bullet7: Two inner domes
part.bullet9: The dome cover mounts to the clutch basket and the slotted cover mounts to the outer cover allowing multiple different styles.

part.partDescription: Clutch Adjusting Screw with Jam Nut
part.productName: Clutch Adjusting Screw with Jam Nut
part.bullet1: Comes with hex jam nut and O-rings
Replacement motor plate bearing
part.bullet2: For use on BDL Belt Drive clutches.

part.partDescription: Open Belt Drive - 2" - Black - '07-'16 Big Twins
part.productName: 2" Open Belt Drive Kit with 2-Piece Motor Plate
part.bullet1: Springs and spring collar are enhanced for more positive lock-up engagement, great for big-inch/high-horsepower motors
part.bullet2: Belt profiles are unique to each kit, requiring matched pulleys for each belt; pulleys may not be interchanged
part.bullet3: Diaphragm clutch is a 6-bolt configuration for a more firm feel and improved appearance
part.bullet4: Front pulley face and spring collar have a matching pattern to the rear pulley
part.bullet5: Kit includes side and top guard for an aggressive, open dome look
part.bullet6: Front pulley cover is counter-bored for a super-clean appearance
part.bullet7: Features a two-piece motor plate design and 2" primary belt
part.bullet8: 52/69 pulley combination for a 1.32:1 final drive ratio
part.bullet9: Ball-bearing pressure plate

part.productName: 2" Open Belt Drive Kit with 2-Piece Motor Plate
part.bullet1: Springs and spring collar are enhanced for more positive lock-up engagement, great for big-inch/high-horsepower motors
part.bullet2: Belt profiles are unique to each kit, requiring matched pulleys for each belt; pulleys may not be interchanged
part.bullet3: Diaphragm clutch is a 6-bolt configuration for a more firm feel and improved appearance
part.bullet4: Front pulley face and spring collar have a matching pattern to the rear pulley
part.bullet5: Kit includes side and top guard for an aggressive, open dome look
part.bullet6: Front pulley cover is counter-bored for a super-clean appearance
part.bullet7: Features a two-piece motor plate design and 2" primary belt
part.bullet8: 52/69 pulley combination for a 1.32:1 final drive ratio
part.bullet9: Ball-bearing pressure plate

part.productName: 2" Open Belt Drive Kit with 2-Piece Motor Plate
part.bullet1: Springs and spring collar are enhanced for more positive lock-up engagement, great for big-inch/high-horsepower motors
part.bullet2: Belt profiles are unique to each kit, requiring matched pulleys for each belt; pulleys may not be interchanged
part.bullet3: Diaphragm clutch is a 6-bolt configuration for a more firm feel and improved appearance
part.bullet4: Front pulley face and spring collar have a matching pattern to the rear pulley
part.bullet5: Kit includes side and top guard for an aggressive, open dome look
part.bullet6: Front pulley cover is counter-bored for a super-clean appearance
part.bullet7: Features a two-piece motor plate design and 2" primary belt
part.bullet8: 52/69 pulley combination for a 1.32:1 final drive ratio
part.bullet9: Ball-bearing pressure plate

part.partDescription: Open Belt Drive with One-Piece Motor Plate - 2" - Black - Softail
part.productName: 2" Open Belt Drive Kits with 1-Piece Motor Plate
part.bullet1: Springs and spring collar are enhanced for more positive lock-up engagement, great for big-inch/high-horsepower motors
part.bullet2: Belt profiles are unique to each kit, requiring matched pulleys for each belt; pulleys may not be interchanged
part.bullet3: Diaphragm clutch is a 6-bolt configuration for a more firm feel and improved appearance
part.bullet4: Front pulley face and spring collar have a matching pattern to the rear pulley
part.bullet5: Kit includes side and top guard for an aggressive, open dome look
part.bullet6: Front pulley cover is counter-bored for a super-clean appearance
part.bullet7: Features a one-piece motor plate design and 2" primary belt
part.bullet8: 52/69 pulley combination for a 1.32:1 final drive ratio
part.bullet9: Ball-bearing pressure plate

part.bullet1: BDL now offers Gates carbon X7N material for its rear belts which is far superior to aramid cord belts
part.bullet2: The same brand used by Harley-Davidson since 1980 due to its reliability
part.bullet3: Teeth on the belts have a slick surface that is easy on pulleys
part.bullet4: Outer surface of the Gates belt is ribbed to help with flexibility
part.bullet5: Higher reliability due to increased length stability and better pitch
part.bullet7: Higher tensile strength and robust construction
part.bullet9: No warranty claims are made or implied.

part.partDescription: Solid Primary Sprocket Kit - 25T - Big Twin
part.bullet1: Includes a 25T sprocket, flat washer and front pulley/sprocket nut
part.bullet2: Eliminates the need for a complete compensator assembly
part.bullet3: Made in the USA
part.bullet4: Minor shimming may be required for proper alignment.

part.bullet1: Replacement BDL primary belt
Designed for electric start applications
part.bullet2: Rear 72/front 47 pulley combination
part.bullet3: Kit includes:
part.bullet4: 141T drive belt
part.bullet5: Motor plate
part.bullet7: Starter pinion gear assembly
part.bullet9: Ball-bearing pressure plate and hardware
part.bullet11: For use with '90-'06 style starter (not included).

part.specialInstructions: Year application should be 41-E54 (disregard operator note)
part.bullet1: Pulley and clutch baskets are hard-anodized aluminum
part.bullet2: Front pulley is drilled and tapped for easy removal
part.bullet3: 39T front pulley
part.bullet4: 61T rear basket
part.bullet5: 8 mm x 1-1/2" 132T primary belt
part.bullet7: For use with tapered engine shaft manufactured from '36-'54.
part.bullet8: Inner clutch hub and plates are not included. Must be purchased separately.

part.bullet1: Pulley and clutch baskets are hard-anodized aluminum
part.bullet2: Front pulley is drilled and tapped for easy removal
part.bullet3: 61T basket
part.bullet4: 39T front pulley
part.bullet5: 8 mm x 1-1/2" 132T primary belt
part.bullet7: For use with splined engine shaft manufactured from '55-'64.
part.bullet8: Inner clutch hub and plates are not included. Must be purchased separately.

part.productName: Replacement 1-1/2" Front Pulley for BDL Belt Drive Kit
part.bullet1: Pulley features bolt-in splined or tapered insert
part.bullet2: Includes belt guides and mounting hardware
part.bullet3: Tough, high-quality billet construction
part.bullet4: Hard anodized finish
part.bullet5: Made in the USA

part.bullet1: Primary chain sprocket and 106T starter ring gear included
part.bullet2: Dual retaining ring design
part.bullet3: Stronger than OEM
part.bullet4: Made in the USA
part.bullet5: Allows the use of Twin Cam style bearing OEM #37906-11, and M8 style bearing OEM #3700168 (sold separately).

part.partDescription: Compensator Sprocket Kit - 25 Tooth - '94-'06 Big Twin
part.bullet1: Three-piece patented design with no spring
part.bullet2: Weighs less than the stock sprocket
part.bullet3: Made in the USA

part.partDescription: Compensator Sprocket Kit - 24 Tooth - '70-'93 Big Twin
part.bullet1: Three-piece patented design with no spring
part.bullet2: Weighs less than the stock sprocket
part.bullet3: Made in the USA

part.partDescription: Timing Belt - 70 Tooth - 19.00 mm Width - Ducati
part.bullet1: Proven design is an exact replacement for OE belts
part.bullet2: Manufactured to the highest quality standards to provide long, trouble-free service life

part.partDescription: Timing Belt - 68 Tooth - 18.00 mm Width - Ducati
part.bullet1: Proven design is an exact replacement for OE belts
part.bullet2: Manufactured to the highest quality standards to provide long, trouble-free service life

part.bullet1: Proven design is an exact replacement for OE belts

part.partDescription: Timing Belt - 72 Tooth - 19.00 mm Width - Bimota | Ducati
part.bullet1: Proven design is an exact replacement for OE belts
part.bullet2: Manufactured to the highest quality standards to provide long, trouble-free service life

part.partDescription: Timing Belt - 68 Tooth - 19.05 mm Width - Bimota | Cagiva | Ducati
part.bullet1: Proven design is an exact replacement for OE belts
part.bullet2: Manufactured to the highest quality standards to provide long, trouble-free service life

part.bullet1: BDL now offers Gates carbon X7N material for its rear belts which is far superior to aramid cord belts
part.bullet2: The same brand used by Harley-Davidson since 1980 due to its reliability
part.bullet3: Teeth on the belts have a slick surface that is easy on pulleys
part.bullet4: Outer surface of the Gates belt is ribbed to help with flexibility
part.bullet5: Higher reliability due to increased length stability and better pitch
part.bullet7: Higher tensile strength and robust construction
part.bullet9: No warranty claims are made or implied.

part.bullet9: No warranty claims are made or implied.

part.bullet1: Four tempered steel drive plates also included
part.bullet2: Clutch plates are 20% wider than stock for improved clutch engagement and holding
part.bullet3: Both kit clutch plate stack height pre-set for easy installation
part.bullet4: Made in the U.S.A.

part.bullet1: Four tempered steel drive plates also included
part.bullet2: Clutch plates are 20% wider than stock for improved clutch engagement and holding
part.bullet3: Both kit clutch plate stack height pre-set for easy installation
part.bullet4: Made in the U.S.A.

part.bullet1: Plates measure 25% wider than the OEM plates for a significant increase in the clutch area
part.bullet2: Stack height is pre-set for easy installation
part.bullet3: Can be used in wet or dry clutches
part.bullet4: Made in the U.S.A.

part.productName: High-Performance Clutch Kit with Extra Plate
part.bullet1: Plates have 11% more surface area for more positive clutch engagement - ideal for big-bore models
part.bullet2: Pre-measured stack height for easy installation

part.bullet1: Pulley features bolt-in splined or tapered insert
part.bullet2: Includes belt guides and mounting hardware
part.bullet3: Tough, high-quality billet construction
part.bullet4: Hard anodized finish
part.bullet5: Made in the USA

part.partDescription: Open Belt Drive with Two-Piece Motor Plate - 2" - Black
part.specialInstructions: Not for use on any FLFB models
part.productName: 2" Open Belt Drive with 2-Piece Motor Plate
part.bullet1: Springs and spring collar are enhanced for more positive lock-up engagement, great for big-inch/high-horsepower motors
part.bullet2: Belt profiles are unique to each kit, requiring matched pulleys for each belt; pulleys may not be interchanged
part.bullet3: Diaphragm clutch is a 6-bolt configuration for a more firm feel and improved appearance
part.bullet4: Front pulley face and spring collar have a matching pattern to the rear pulley
part.bullet5: Kit includes side and top guard for an aggressive, open dome look
part.bullet6: Front pulley cover is counterbored for a super-clean appearance
part.bullet7: Features a two-piece motor plate design and 2" primary belt
part.bullet8: 52/69 pulley combination for a 1.32:1 final drive ratio
part.bullet9: Ball-bearing pressure plate

part.bullet1: 60% more surface area than stock plates for strong, positive clutch engagement
part.bullet2: Made in the U.S.A.

part.bullet1: Clutch pack plates have 60% more surface area than stock plates for strong, positive clutch engagement
part.bullet2: Made in the U.S.A.

part.bullet1: 60% more surface area than stock plates for strong, positive clutch engagement
part.bullet2: Made in the U.S.A.

part.productName: High-Performance Clutch Kit with Extra Plate
part.bullet1: Plates have 11% more surface area for more positive clutch engagement - ideal for big-bore models
part.bullet2: Pre-measured stack height for easy installation
part.bullet3: Made in the U.S.A.

part.bullet1: Plates measure 25% wider than the OEM plates for a significant increase in the clutch area
part.bullet2: Stack height is pre-set for easy installation
part.bullet3: Can be used in wet or dry clutches
part.bullet4: Made in the U.S.A.

part.bullet1: Standard equipment with all of BDL's 2" SS series primary drives
part.bullet2: Converts existing clutches to a ball-bearing lockup design
part.bullet3: Lockup design applies extra pressure to the clutch plates for positive engagement with no clutch slippage
part.bullet4: No increase in lever pull effort
part.bullet5: Kit includes all necessary components for a complete retrofit

part.specialInstructions: Running vendor change, now a 6-bolt design
part.bullet1: Polished pressure plate adds a custom touch when using an open belt drive
part.bullet2: Race-proven aramid clutch pack included
part.bullet3: Made in the U.S.A.

part.bullet1: Polished pressure plate adds a custom touch when using an open belt drive
part.bullet2: Race-proven aramid clutch pack included
part.bullet3: Made in the U.S.A.

part.bullet1: Standard equipment with all of BDL's SS series primary drives
part.bullet2: Converts existing clutches to a ball-bearing lockup design
part.bullet3: Lockup design applies extra pressure to the clutch plates for positive engagement with no clutch slippage
part.bullet4: No increase in lever pull effort
part.bullet5: Kit includes all necessary components for a complete retrofit

part.productName: High Performance Ball-Bearing Lockup Clutch Upgrade Kit
part.bullet1: Increasing horsepower and torque is common place, but that extra power can throw your clutch into a tailspin
part.bullet2: Kit includes one heavy-duty diaphragm spring and set of carbide ball bearings
part.bullet3: Stiffer spring with harder and heavier ball bearings produce more pressure onto the clutch, helping to prevent slipping and overheating
part.bullet4: Harder and heavier ball bearings lift spring quicker and actuate faster to create more pressure at an advanced rate
part.bullet5: Pressure plates with 32-bearing pockets should use the 3/8" ball bearings
part.bullet6: If your current ball bearing pressure plate has 32 ball bearing pockets it takes 3/8” diameter bearings, if the pressure plate has 42 pockets it will use 5/16” diameter bearings
part.bullet7: Pressure plates with 42-bearing pockets should use the 5/16" ball bearings

part.bullet1: For use on BDL Belt Drive Clutches

part.partDescription: Offset Spacer with Screws and Nut - 0"
part.bullet1: Used to offset motor pulley for belt alignment
part.bullet2: Pulleys and spacer inserts sold separately
part.bullet3: Includes a motor sprocket nut and mounting screws
part.bullet4: Made in the U.S.A.

part.bullet1: Replacement outboard bearings
part.bullet2: For use on BDL Belt Drive clutches.

part.bullet1: Precision machined out of aluminum and then hard anodized

part.bullet1: Replacement rear pulley cover

part.partDescription: Monster Belt Drive with Outboard Support Bearing
part.productName: Monster Top Fuel Belt Drive Kit with Clutch
part.bullet1: Kit includes front and rear pulley, 3-3/8" belt, nine aramid friction plates and eleven steel clutch plates; use up to nine springs for varying pressure to accommodate any motor size
part.bullet2: Includes oil filter mount between the pulleys
part.bullet3: Made in the USA
part.bullet4: Systems are not designed for use with floorboards.
part.bullet5: Replacement components available separately.

part.bullet1: BDL's ball-bearing lockup clutch with ring gear provides ease of shifting and positive clutch engagement
part.bullet2: Streamlined baseplate provides a unique look
part.bullet3: Kit includes:
part.bullet4: 142T drive belt
part.bullet5: Motor plate
part.bullet7: Standoffs
part.bullet8: Side guard and rear pulley cover with hardware
part.bullet9: Made in the USA

part.bullet1: BDL's ball-bearing lockup clutch with ring gear provides ease of shifting and positive clutch engagement
part.bullet2: Streamlined baseplate provides a unique look
part.bullet3: Kit includes:
part.bullet4: 142T drive belt
part.bullet5: Motor plate
part.bullet7: Standoffs
part.bullet8: Side guard and rear pulley cover with hardware

part.bullet1: Includes BDL's ball-bearing lockup clutch, full-coverage side guard and top mesh belt guard
part.bullet2: Kit also includes motor plate and a 132T belt
part.bullet3: 2" drive width allows for the use of stock floorboards
part.bullet4: Made in the USA

part.productName: 1-5/8" 8 mm Belt Drive With Lockup Clutch
part.bullet1: 1-5/8" 8 mm kit includes front pulley, belt, clutch hub, clutch basket and aramid clutch set (consists of two half plates, four full plates and five steel drive plates)
part.bullet2: Rear pulley has a 40 mm, double-row bearing with an inner stress-proof steel clutch hub to support the clutch
part.bullet3: Lockup design applies extra pressure to the clutch plates for positive engagement with no clutch slippage
part.bullet4: Comes with the Quiet Clutch and ball-bearing lockup design pressure plate
part.bullet5: No increase in lever pull effort
part.bullet7: Made in the USA
part.bullet8: Not for use with offset primaries.
part.bullet9: Replacement components available separately.

part.productName: 8 mm Belt Drive with Quiet Clutch System
part.bullet1: 8 mm kit includes front pulley, belt, clutch hub, clutch basket and aramid clutch set (consists of two half plates, four full plates and five steel drive plates)
part.bullet2: Precision-machined, polished aluminum pressure plate uses nine springs and shoulder bolts to ensure even spring pressure (included in kit)
part.bullet3: Rear pulley has a 40 mm, double-row bearing with an inner stress-proof steel clutch hub to support the clutch
part.bullet4: Comes with the Quiet Clutch system
part.bullet5: Direct bolt-in applications
part.bullet7: Not for use with offset primaries.

part.bullet1: Replacement BDL primary belt
Replacement BDL primary belt
Replacement BDL primary belt

part.productName: 3" Electric Start 8 mm Belt Drive with Lockup Clutch
part.bullet1: 3" electric start 8 mm kit includes front pulley, belt, clutch hub and clutch basket and aramid clutch set (consists of two half plates, four full plates and five steel drive plates), 6061-T6 billet motor plate, outside guard and polished pulley cover
part.bullet2: Rear pulley has a 40 mm, double-row bearing with an inner stress-proof steel clutch hub to support the clutch
part.bullet3: Lockup design applies extra pressure to the clutch plates for positive engagement with no clutch slippage
part.bullet4: Comes with the Quiet Clutch and ball-bearing lockup design pressure plate
part.bullet5: No increase in lever pull effort
part.bullet7: Made in the USA
part.bullet8: 3" systems are not designed for use with floorboards.
part.bullet9: Not for use with offset primaries.

part.bullet1: One of BDL's original closed primary belt drives
part.bullet2: Clutch features 12 cylindrical replaceable clutch dogs, which allows clutch plates to maintain constant contact
part.bullet3: Clutch plates give the maximum performance with an improved ball-bearing pressure plate
part.bullet4: Kit includes:
part.bullet5: 52T front pulley
part.bullet7: Complete clutch kit with ring gear, ball-bearing pressure plate and hardware
part.bullet9: Will not fit Rocker or Breakout models.

part.productName: 2" Open Belt Drive Kit with 2-Piece Motor Plate
part.bullet1: Springs and spring collar are enhanced for more positive lock-up engagement, great for big-inch/high-horsepower motors
part.bullet2: Belt profiles are unique to each kit, requiring matched pulleys for each belt; pulleys may not be interchanged
part.bullet3: Diaphragm clutch is a 6-bolt configuration for a more firm feel and improved appearance
part.bullet4: Front pulley face and spring collar have a matching pattern to the rear pulley
part.bullet5: Kit includes side and top guard for an aggressive, open dome look
part.bullet6: Front pulley cover is counter-bored for a super-clean appearance
part.bullet7: Features a two-piece motor plate design and 2" primary belt

part.productName: Cam Cover Conversion Kit for Twin Cam Motors
part.bullet1: Converts Twin Cam ignitions to earlier Evolution-style electronic ignition
part.bullet2: Can be used with any aftermarket ignition/rotor cup system
part.bullet3: Great when building a custom bike with a kickstart transmission, a Twin Cam engine and gear-driven cams - the stock ignition is not kickstart compatible
part.bullet4: Allows the use of aftermarket Evolution wiring harnesses
part.bullet5: Made from 6061 T-6 billet aluminum with a polished finish
part.bullet6: Kit includes cam cover, special bolt, cam cover end adapter and seal
part.bullet7: Made in the U.S.A.
part.bullet8: Not for use on fuel-injected models.

part.partDescription: Belt Drive without Cover Kit - SS-2 - 2"
part.bullet1: Clutch design eliminates clutch dogs and features an internal mill-cut basket to drive the clutch

part.bullet4: Beautiful styling and awesome performance

part.partDescription: Belt Drive Kit w/Quiet Clutch System - 3" - 8 mm
part.productName: 8 mm Belt Drive with Quiet Clutch System
part.bullet1: Includes front pulley, belt, clutch hub and clutch basket and aramid clutch set (consists of two half plates, four full plates and five steel drive plates), 6061-T6 billet motor plate, outside guard and polished pulley cover
part.bullet2: Precision-machined, polished aluminum pressure plate uses nine springs and shoulder bolts to ensure even spring pressure (included in kit)
part.bullet3: Rear pulley has a 40 mm, double-row bearing with an inner stress-proof steel clutch hub to support the clutch
part.bullet4: 3' kick start system is a direct bolt-in application
part.bullet5: Features BDL's Quiet Clutch system

part.bullet1: Used to offset motor pulley for belt alignment

part.partDescription: Offset Spacer with Screws and Nut - 2"
part.bullet1: Used to offset motor pulley for belt alignment
part.bullet2: Pulleys and spacer inserts sold separately
part.bullet3: Includes a motor sprocket nut and mounting screws
part.bullet4: Made in the U.S.A.

part.bullet1: Choose the appropriate side of the tool for kit; one side is for open belt drives up to 06 models and the smaller, reverse side is for open belt drive kits for 07-16 models
part.bullet2: For use on all Belt Drive LTD® (BDL) open belt drive kits
part.bullet3: Made in the U.S.A.

part.bullet1: Designed to help properly torque the clutch basket and hub assembly to the mainshaft of the transmission
part.bullet2: No need to use an impact wrench that can damage the basket, hub or other components
part.bullet3: Made in the USA
part.bullet4: For use on all BDL belt drive units that have the BDL round clutch dogs.

part.bullet1: Used to lock up the clutch hub and basket assemblies to help properly torque the clutch hub nut to a specified torque specification using a torque wrench
part.bullet2: For all Belt Drive LTD® (BDL) complete chain drive kits and chain drive baskets with BDL chain drive clutch hubs
part.bullet3: Maximum torque on tapered mainshaft hub nuts is 50 -60 ft. lbs. and 70-80 ft. lbs. on the splined clutch hub nut
part.bullet4: Not an impact wrench that can damage the clutch hub
part.bullet5: Made in the USA

part.bullet1: Made from 6061-T6 aluminum, then hard anodized for durability
part.bullet2: One-third the weight of stock pulleys
part.bullet3: Made in the USA
part.bullet4: When using a larger or smaller pulley, change in belt length and modifications to the axle adjustment slots may be required.
